description: The Kyosei-kai is a yakuza group based in Hiroshima, Japan, formed in May 1964 by bakuto Tatsuo Yamamura from seven yakuza clans. Known for fierce conflicts with other groups, particularly the Yamaguchi-gumi, it has been a leading member of anti-Yamaguchi federations. The group has around 120 members and is led by Susumu Arase.
